pages.title: Refund Policy
pages.text: Full refund within 30 days of purchase. Contact support@example.com to request a refund. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.

pages.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.text: Q: How do I get started? A: Sign up and complete the onboarding. Q: What payment methods do you accept? A: We accept credit cards and PayPal. Q: Is there a free trial? A: Yes, 14 days free trial available.

pages.title: Support
pages.text: Our support team is available 24/7. Email: support@example.com. Average response time: under 2 hours. For urgent issues, use the live chat.
